Notes: UWO wins Main View Tip-Off Tournament...UWO's E. Campbell (Most Outstanding
Player), Melotik and Pustina named to All-Tournament Team...Nine UWO players
score 6-plus points, including Rueth who tallied 14...UWO led 53-11 at
halftime...UWO shot 63.1 percent from field and had just four turnovers.
Game.Officials: Ron Nordquist,  Ken Schau,  Tim Mowry
